source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the system shown in <image>, \( m(t) \) is a low-pass signal with bandwidth \( W \) Hz. The frequency response of the band-pass filter \( H(f) \) is shown in <image>. If it is desired that the output signal \( z(t) = 10x(t) \), the maximum value of \( W \) (in Hz) should be strictly less than ______.

solving likely requires joint use of the system diagram and filter plot, indicating multi-step multimodal reasoning
